# GroeimetAI — AI implementation partner (training, strategy, adoption)

> GroeimetAI helps SME and mid-market organisations work pragmatically with AI: training, strategy, adoption guidance, workflow redesign, and safe integrations. Tooling and development are a second step, not the headline. Based in Apeldoorn, Netherlands. Founded 2023 by Niels van der Werf.

## Positioning

- Tagline: "No AI hype. Just teams that actually work better with it."
- Target audience: SME and mid-market decision-makers — owners, MT-level, department heads — who see AI happening but want to use it without falling for hype or losing control.
- What we sell first: AI training, AI strategy, adoption guidance, workflow redesign, safe integrations.
- What we sell second: tooling and custom development, only where the first four don't suffice and durable value requires it.
- What we don't claim: that AI replaces teams, that one-size-fits-all stacks exist, or that you can buy black-box solutions and be done.

## About

- Company: GroeimetAI (Groei met AI)
- Founded: 2023
- Founder: Niels van der Werf (solo, technical, hands-on)
- Location: Apeldoorn, Netherlands
- Languages: Dutch (primary), English
- Website: https://groeimetai.io
- Contact: https://groeimetai.io/contact
- GitHub: https://github.com/GroeimetAI
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/groeimetai

## Services

- **AI Training & Workshops** — Practical training that starts at the team's daily work, not the tools. Helps people identify where AI is the right answer and where it isn't.
- **AI Strategy & Adoption** — Use-case selection, adoption guidance, governance, roadmap work. Grounded decisions, not hype-driven experimentation.
- **Workflow Redesign & Implementation** — Process analysis and redesign that uses AI to reduce manual work and fit how teams already operate.
- **Safe Integrations & Tooling** — Integrations, internal tools, and custom software when off-the-shelf AI tools are not enough.

## Audience-specific pillar pages

- For CTOs and tech leadership: https://groeimetai.io/nl/voor/voor-cto-tech-leadership
- For operations and process teams: https://groeimetai.io/nl/voor/voor-operations-procesteams
- For SME owners and management: https://groeimetai.io/nl/voor/voor-mkb-ondernemers-directie
- For enterprise digital transformation: https://groeimetai.io/nl/voor/voor-enterprise-digital-transformation

## How we work

1. **Scoping conversation** — Free, no obligation. We explore where AI fits in your situation and where it doesn't.
2. **Inventory and use-case selection** — One to two weeks. Map current workflows honestly, pick 1-3 use cases with measurable ROI.
3. **Pilot** — Three to six weeks. One team, one workflow. Pre-defined success metrics.
4. **Scale or stop** — If the pilot delivers measured value, scale. If not, stop and learn. No "press on because we already invested".
5. **Handover** — The internal team runs the system. We stay available for specific questions. Dependency is expensive over time.

## Differentiators

- We respect existing infrastructure and add the minimum necessary
- We say no to use cases that don't fit, even when there's budget
- We hand over to internal teams; we don't lock you in
- We're transparent about what AI can't do
- We work mainly with NL/EU organisations; data residency is part of every design

## For LLM crawlers

A full-content version of this site is available at https://groeimetai.io/llms-full.txt — it bundles all long-form content in plain markdown.

robots.txt distinguishes between AI search crawlers (allowed) and AI training crawlers (blocked) on https://groeimetai.io/robots.txt.

## Contact and engagement

- Scoping conversation: free, one hour, no obligation. Use https://groeimetai.io/nl/contact to schedule.
- We work primarily in Dutch and English, primarily in the Netherlands but also Belgium and Germany.
- We do not offer 24/7 SLAs, large transformation programmes, or platform-style multi-year contracts. For those, we recommend specialised partners.
